outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected due to heavily positive Total GEX across all expirations, which suppresses large price movements and favors mean-reversion.
outlook.summary: Spot is trading directly under the 680 Call Wall Resonance. With significantly positive GEX concentrated in short-term expiries, market makers are heavily long gamma, actively capping volatility. A pronounced bearish skew confirms upside limitations, making a breakout above 680 highly unlikely. Expect prices to be strictly contained between 680 resistance and 670 support, gravitating towards the 0DTE Max Pain at 671.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE across all three expiries with massive Call OI (256k+ in 0DTE). Directly overhead from the current spot price, creating an impenetrable structural ceiling.
RESONANCE across all expirations with strong Put OI. Provides robust structural support just below the spot price.
RESONANCE with massive Put OI across all timeframes. Acts as the ultimate structural floor for the current cycle.
CONFLUENCE in WEEKLY and MONTHLY with top-tier Call OI and active Put OI. Creates a high-friction zone pinning the price.
0DTE Max Pain level. With positive GEX dominating the market, spot has a high probability of reverting to this level.
Dominant Call OI in the MONTHLY expiration. Represents a hard ceiling for the broader monthly trend.
